clues.clue: Colour endless in a divine English novel
Maybe 501s with shirt put outside to air
Young swimmer Henry’s widow
Chilled environment in wild for rare tiger
Dessert timid sort swallows slowly at first
Blakey for one is to strive for creative skill
Nothing stops Kelvin, a debauchee, in pub activity
Adult struck — struck with shame
Jousting weapon returned to lake for knight
Spaniards here competed in scoreless draw
Show without Tarzan struggling to entertain Virginia and Georgia
Son leaves belt in corner
Excited seeing leg — not small — in flimsy robe
Dance party taking place next to European capital
Help mounted soldiers cutting spring migration
Folk performer, crafty poet leading reindeer
Nutty green apple finally prepared for cake
Just for Latinists, this with others has to go round
Complaint NHS department’s well able to explain?
Duke in good health carrying spades
Plot involving alien laser beam accidentally revealed?
Fools in America delinquent once hit
Almost do away with range of knowledge on New York City
Bishop in argument about new Victorian poet
Place abnormally loaded with hidden gold
Shock where old hand guzzles gallon
Irrigation of Algarve at regular intervals over time
American not eating in land around Lomé
